headline: Berkshire CEO Greg Abel on working with Buffett, Kraft Heinz and using all his salary to buy the stock
summary: Berkshire Hathaway's new CEO, Greg Abel, generated some significant headlines during a roughly half-hour live interview on CNBC's "Squawk Box."
